description_long: This cafe features a single-story brick structure with large, black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The main entrance is accentuated by a small patio area, and the building is surrounded by landscaping elements including two leafy trees and a circular paved area with a flagpole. A pergola structure is visible on one side, likely providing a shaded outdoor space. The roof is flat, with some visible rooftop equipment and a small enclosed section at the rear. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on open, inviting spaces and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, single-story brick cafe with large windows, a patio, trees, and a pergola, blending natural and urban elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, patio, trees, and circular paved area with a flagpole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, pergola, and landscaping with two trees and the circular paved area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back brick wall, rooftop equipment, and a single tree on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat brick wall, pergola, and both trees, with the flagpole and paved area visible.
